_publications._publicationTitle: Validity and interexaminer reliability of a new method to quantify skin neurofibromas of neurofibromatosis 1 using paper frames.

_contextSnippet: There was no statistically significant difference when comparing the general means of the number of neurofibromas obtained from examiner A and examiner B (paired t-test; P = 0.236)
details: No statistically significant difference between examiners (P = 0.236) with mean counts of 67.09 vs 66.17 neurofibromas
